channel.title: Left Hand Brewing - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: Left Hand Brewing: Milk Stout Nitro, Ep. 183
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we explore the beauty and awesomeness of Nitro! Left Hand Brewing is the first to capture the magic in a bottle with their Milk Stout Nitro . The Nitro version is the exact same recipe as the original Milk Stout, however the flavors are more malt forward and the […]

The post Left Hand Brewing: Milk Stout Nitro, Ep. 183 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Left Hand Brewing – Smoke Jumper Imperial Smoked Porter, Ep. 87
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week we sample an unusual beer to many: Left Hand Brewing Company’s Smoke Jumper Imperial Smoked Porter! This is dark and nicely smoked off the nose. They use hot and cold smoked barley malt to give it it’s incredible flavor. There is also a nice sweetness coming from molasses, and a nice hoppiness as […]

The post Left Hand Brewing – Smoke Jumper Imperial Smoked Porter, Ep. 87 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Terrapin Brewing, Left Hand Brewing: Depth Charge, Ep. 84
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
The Midnight Brewing Project continues with an espresso milk stout that will blow your doors off!! Left Hand Brewing and Terrapin Brewing has released their second collaboration brew called Depth Charge . This is a creamy espresso milk stout with a very smooth mouth feel. The espresso explosion off the nose sets you up for […]

The post Terrapin Brewing, Left Hand Brewing: Depth Charge, Ep. 84 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Episode 27 – Terra-Rye’zd Black Rye Lager
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Collaboration takes hold once again as Left Hand Brewing and Terrapin Brewing get together for a “Midnight Brewing Project” . Don’t let the name scare you away, this Black Rye Lager is full of surprises.

The post Episode 27 – Terra-Rye’zd Black Rye Lager first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
